title: Grimoire of Undying
description: Turn your boring totem into an amazing book with immortality spells.
body:
**ABOUT**

Turn your boring totem into an amazing book with immortality spells, created with custom textures and 3D modeling.

Based on the art used for the Minecraft base game.

---
